name: project-protocol
description: Project session discipline plugin. Single brain/ canon (STATUS, BRIEF, WONT-DO, ROADMAP, WORKLOG, CHANGELOG, agenda, docs/, chapters/) replaces the old three-folder layout. 24 skills including CEO/worker/solo role model with git-worktree handoff, new git, grill, bug-fixing, handoff, migrate-to-brain, ceo, worker, and solo skills. Author stamps (· Cowork / · Codex / · Claude Code) replace .session-type marker. Per-release migration manifests. Compatible with Claude Code and Codex.
